content: We can structure the working memory of a cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning AI agent as a dynamically growing Tree of Thoughts, where each leaf node stores an unlabeled candidate observation the agent identifies as high-impact for improving its task performance, and the agent actively queries for human labels only for these high-value leaves instead of all collected experiences. This hierarchical active selection mechanism prunes low-impact branches of the tree to keep memory efficient while accelerating task learning.
